---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse  = TRUE,
  comment   = "#>",
  fig.path  = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%",
  dpi       = 150
)
library(euphoria)
library(ggplot2)
```

# euphoria <img src="man/figures/logo.png" align="right" height="139" />

> *"I just want people to know that you can be whoever you want."*

**{euphoria}** is a ggplot2 theme and color palette package inspired by the
visual aesthetic of HBO's Euphoria — deep purple-black backgrounds, neon orchid
glows, electric pinks and icy blues.

## Installation

```{r install, eval = FALSE}
# Install from GitHub
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("YOURUSERNAME/euphoria")
```

## The Palette

The palette is built around 10 named colors, each tied to a character:

```{r palette, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 2.5}
library(ggplot2)
library(euphoria)

df <- data.frame(
  name  = names(euphoria_colors),
  hex   = unname(euphoria_colors),
  x     = seq_along(euphoria_colors)
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = 1, fill = hex)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "#0a0010", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_text(aes(label = name, colour = ifelse(name == "highlight", "void", "highlight")),
            y = 0.6, size = 3, angle = 30, hjust = 0, family = "serif") +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(void = "#0a0010", highlight = "#ffffff"),
                      guide = "none") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0a0010", colour = NA))
```

## Usage

### Scatter plot

```{r scatter, fig.height = 5}
library(ggplot2)
library(euphoria)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, colour = factor(cyl), size = hp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_euphoria() +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 7)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Euphoria",
    subtitle = "every version of herself she's ever been",
    x        = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
    y        = "Miles per Gallon",
    colour   = "Cylinders",
    size     = "Horsepower",
    caption  = "source: mtcars"
  ) +
  theme_euphoria()
```

### Bar chart

```{r bar, fig.height = 4}
ggplot(mpg, aes(class, fill = class)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_euphoria() +
  labs(title = "Euphoria", subtitle = "glitter & darkness",
       x = "Vehicle Class", y = "Count") +
  theme_euphoria(grid = FALSE)
```

### Heatmap (continuous fill)

```{r heatmap, fig.height = 4}
ggplot(faithfuld, aes(waiting, eruptions, fill = density)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_euphoria_c() +
  labs(title = "Euphoria", subtitle = "faithful in the dark",
       x = "Waiting time (min)", y = "Eruption duration (min)") +
  theme_euphoria()
```

### Faceted plot

```{r facets, fig.height = 5}
ggplot(mpg, aes(displ, hwy, colour = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  scale_colour_euphoria() +
  labs(title = "Euphoria", subtitle = "different years, same story",
       x = "Displacement", y = "Highway MPG", colour = "Cylinders") +
  theme_euphoria()
```

## Font tip 🎨

For maximum Euphoria vibes, use a Google Font like **Playfair Display**:

```{r fonts, eval = FALSE}
library(showtext)
font_add_google("Playfair Display", "playfair")
showtext_auto()

ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, colour = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_colour_euphoria() +
  labs(title = "Euphoria") +
  theme_euphoria(base_family = "playfair")
```

## Color reference

| Name        | Hex       | Character |
|-------------|-----------|-----------|
| `void`      | `#0a0010` | background |
| `abyss`     | `#110022` | panel |
| `shadow`    | `#1e0035` | grid |
| `rue`       | `#7c3aed` | Rue |
| `jules`     | `#f72585` | Jules |
| `maddy`     | `#b5179e` | Maddy |
| `cassie`    | `#4cc9f0` | Cassie |
| `nate`      | `#3a0ca3` | Nate |
| `kat`       | `#4361ee` | Kat |
| `lexi`      | `#7209b7` | Lexi |
| `glitter`   | `#e040fb` | accent/glow |
| `highlight` | `#ffffff` | text |

## License

MIT © Your Name
